basic_details.job_title: ECHS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 10 Peon, Driver and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation, Diploma Holder, B Pharmacy, (10+2) with science stream, Graduate, Class 8th, Literate
qualification.details: Officer In Charge (OIC): Graduation with a minimum of 05 years of work experience in health care institutions in managerial positions. Dental Asst/ Tech/ Hyg: Diploma Holder in Dental Hyg/ Class-1 DH/ DORA Course (Armed Forces) with a minimum of 05 years of work experience in a Dental Laboratory. Pharmacist: (i) B Pharmacy from a recognized institute or (10+2) with a science stream (Physics, Chemistry, Biology) from a recognized board, and (ii) Approved diploma in Pharmacy from an institute recognized by the Pharmacy Council of India and registered as a Pharmacist under the Pharmacy Act 1948. Minimum 03 years of work experience. DEO/Clerk: Graduate/Class-1 Clerical trade (Armed Forces) with a minimum of 05 years of work experience. Driver: Education - Class 8th or Class-1 MT Driver (Armed forces). Must possess a civil driving license. Minimum 05 years of work experience as a Driver. Peon: Education - Class 8th or GD trade (Armed Forces) with a minimum of 05 years of work experience. Chowkidar: Education - Class 8th or GD trade for Armed Forces personnel. Safaiwala: Literate with a minimum of 05 years of work experience.

salary_details.pay_scale: Fixed Rs.95,000/-, Fixed Rs.36,500/-, Fixed Rs.29,200/-, Fixed Rs.25,600/-, Fixed Rs.21,800/-

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ECHS Peon, Driver and More Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.echs.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ECHS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for ECHS Various Posts Recruitment 2026 is 10th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in ECHS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 10 vacancies are available for various posts in the Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS) through this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for ECHS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for ECHS Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official website and submit it via post or as instructed in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for Officer In Charge (OIC) post?
faq.answer: For the Officer In Charge (OIC) post, candidates need to have a Graduation degree with a minimum of 05 years of work experience in health care institutions in managerial positions.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for the Driver post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Driver post in ECHS Recruitment 2026 will receive a fixed salary of Rs. 25,600/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for ECHS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for General/OBC categories in the official notification for ECHS Recruitment 2026. It is advisable to check the official notification for any specific details.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for ECHS Various Posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the various posts under ECHS Recruitment 2026 will be based on an Interview. Candidates shortlisted after the initial screening will be called for the interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the ECHS application form?
faq.answer: The application form for ECHS Recruitment 2026 can be downloaded from the official website of ECHS, which is www.echs.gov.in.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this ECHS recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for this ECHS recruitment is contractual. Candidates will be appointed on a contract basis for the specified period.

faq.question: Q10. Which state is this ECHS recruitment for?
faq.answer: This ECHS recruitment is for the state of Chhattisgarh, specifically for the city of Raipur.
